content: Phase 6 remaining ~45 few_images ships fall into three intractable buckets: (1) Unbuilt TBN ships — RCL Icon-class TBN 2027/2028, Oasis-class TBN 2028, Quantum Ultra TBN 2028/2029, Star-class TBN 2028, Celebrity unnamed Edge/Project-Nirvana/River-class, Carnival Project Ace 1/2/3, Carnival Tropicale 2028 — no photos possible. (2) Future not-yet-in-service ships — MSC World Asia debut Nov 2026, Explora III-VI rolling 2026-2028, Legend of the Seas 2026 Icon-class — no Commons content yet. (3) Brand-new ships with 1-2 Commons photos — Carnival Firenze, Star Princess, Explora II, Seven Seas Grandeur, Silver Origin, Brilliant Lady, Celebrity Xcel/Xperience/Compass/Seeker, Carnival Encounter post-rebrand — partial-progress committed where possible.
